name: Premier Football Arena
addressFull: 580/77 Land Office 2, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Open 24 hours daily according to current Google Maps and ThaiThurkic listings; organised sessions follow their own schedules.

booking.method: Call +66 89 224 5665 or message the operator Facebook page. Public hourly-hire terms were not published.

pickupGames.schedule: Walking football every Sunday at 17:00 according to the current organiser page.
pickupGames.howToJoin: Contact the Walking Football Association on +66 61 560 0949 or team@thailand-jomtien-wf.com.
pickupGames.skillLevel: All skill levels; walkingfootball.com describes a mixed over-50 session suitable for beginners through advanced players.
pickupGames.contactChannel: English phone and email through the Walking Football Association.

leagues.details: The operator published multiple named-team fixtures in February 2026. The venue also hosts regular walking football and hosted an international walking-football tournament in December 2024.

football.englishEvidence: A current English organiser publishes the exact weekly venue, welcomes every skill level and provides a Pattaya phone and email. This confirms a usable English pathway for the organised session, though not English-speaking venue staff for private hire.

praise: A Thai review from two months before verification praises the coaching and value.
Thai parents repeatedly describe attentive coaches, frequent academy competitions and useful skills development for children.
complaints: No repeated facility complaint emerged from the visible review set. One low rating appears to concern map-location correctness rather than play or service, so it was not converted into a facility complaint.

sources.label: Google Maps identity, coordinates, current status and Thai reviews
Current operator-post mirror with February 2026 fixtures, phone and address
ThaiThurkic current phone, address and 24-hour listing
Current Walking Football Association weekly session and joining contacts
Walking Football Association history and regular-use context

Pattaya Mail international walking-football tournament and open-team registration
Thai Lemon8 venue and youth-league account

confidenceReason: The stranger-joinable pickup pathway is established, but no numeric hourly rate and no direct floodlighting specification were found. Two required stars are missing.
unverified: whether general public hourly hire is available
whether current leagues accept new teams
English-speaking staff for private pitch hire
relationship between the arena and Pattaya Inter Academy shown in reviews
